title: Adapter chat uses PSS+GSOC with ACT-encrypted history; settings surface live Bee diagnostics
content:
Chat (PSS + GSOC) features:
- **1-to-1 encrypted messaging** via PSS, with GSOC-backed offline delivery.
- **Discord-style UI** with unread badge on the sidebar.
- **Persistent history** in ACT-encrypted feeds, paginated backwards.
- **File sharing** for images, GIFs, PDFs, audio, video, and text — all ACT-encrypted.
- **External `bzz://<hash>` previews** for files uploaded outside the chat.
- **Drag-and-drop uploads**, inline previews, lightbox, **200 MB cap**.
- **Pre-flight codec check for video** so unplayable formats fall back to a download instead of failing mid-playback.

Settings features:
- **Live chain-price fetching** for stamp top-ups (no hardcoded price drift).
- **Real Bee error surfacing** on stamp operations. The UI parses `BeeResponseError.responseBody`, so users see the actual on-chain reason instead of a generic `500`.
- **Bucket-utilization diagnostics** with dilute, expand, and top-up actions.
description: Chat delivers 1-to-1 encrypted messaging via PSS with offline delivery, persistent ACT-encrypted history, file sharing up to 200 MB; settings show live chain prices and real Bee error reasons.
